short: Arcane Recovery: recover up to 2 levels of spell slots (1/day)
long: Arcane Recovery + Inspiration restored · Death saves cleared
rest.shortToast: Short rest — spend Hit Dice; use Arcane Recovery to get slots back.
rest.longToast: Long rest — fully restored. Roll two new Portent dice.

extras.name: Ritual Adept ⓘ
extras.sub: cast ritual-tagged spells in your book without preparing them

extras.name: Divination Savant ⓘ
extras.sub: copy divination spells into your book at half cost & time

items.name: Spellbook
items.tag: your prepared spells are drawn from this

list.name: Portent
list.sub: roll 2 d20 after a long rest · replace any d20 with one

list.name: Divination Savant
list.sub: copy divination spells at half cost & time

list.name: Arcane Recovery
list.sub: recover slots on a short rest · 1/day

list.name: Ritual Adept
list.sub: ritual-cast any ritual spell in your book

list.name: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
list.sub: Sage feat · Toll the Dead, Prestidigitation · Detect Magic 1×/long rest

list.name: Background: Sage
list.sub: Arcana · History · Calligrapher's Supplies · Magic Initiate (Wizard)

list.sub: Heroic Inspiration after each long rest

list.name: Human: Versatile
list.sub: a second Origin feat — to place

paras: Elias Thorn is a scholar of the Valtaran academies — a researcher and student of hidden truths. Where other wizards chase power, he chases understanding: omens, patterns, dreams, and the signs that thread through them.

For years he bought rare herbs, fungi, and curious specimens from Elowen Raincaller. Their friendship was a quiet, occasional thing, but he respected her knowledge and the uncanny accuracy of her insight.

Lately his work has turned strange. The same symbols recur across unrelated divinations. Dreams repeat. Every reading bends toward the wilderness south of Thunderford, as if something there is pulling at the threads of fate.
When word comes that Elowen has vanished, the pattern snaps into focus. Elias closes his books, gathers his components, and decides it is time to stop studying mysteries and start investigating them.

items.html: Species: Human — Resourceful, Skillful (+1 skill), Versatile (+1 Origin feat), Speed 30
Ability scores: Str 8, Dex 13, Con 14, Int 15, Wis 12, Cha 10 (standard array; background +2 Int / +1 Con)
Spellcasting — Intelligence; spellbook, 3 cantrips + prepared spells; 2 first-level slots
Background: Sage — Origin feat Magic Initiate (Wizard); skills Arcana & History; Calligrapher's Supplies; +2 Int / +1 Con
Arcane Recovery — recover slots on a short rest, 1/day
Portent — roll 2 d20 after a long rest, replace any d20
Divination Savant; spells → 3 first-level + 2 second-level slots
Human Versatile Origin feat — to place (Alert, Lucky, Tough, or another Magic Initiate)

combat.note: Your turn: Move up to your Speed, take one Action, and one Bonus Action. You also get one , used when its trigger happens (often on someone else's turn) — like a foe leaving your .

moves.label: Cast Magic Missile
moves.detail: three darts, 1d4+1 force · +1 dart per slot level above 1st

moves.label: Cast Web
moves.detail: Restrain in a 20-ft cube · Dex save · Conc.

moves.label: Shield
moves.detail: +5 AC until your next turn · costs a 1st-level slot

moves.label: Opportunity Attack
moves.detail: one melee attack when a foe leaves your reach

moves.label: Portent — replace a d20
moves.detail: use a recorded Portent roll for any d20 you can see

cantrips.name: Mage Hand
cantrips.sub: spectral hand · move 10 lb at 30 ft

catalog.name: Shield
catalog.note: Reaction · +5 AC until your next turn

catalog.name: Sleep
catalog.note: 5d8 HP of creatures fall unconscious · Conc.

catalog.name: Feather Fall
catalog.note: Reaction · slow falling for up to 5 creatures

catalog.name: Augury
catalog.note: an omen for a plan within 30 min · ritual

grantsPool.label: Arcane Recovery
grantsPool.reminder: Arcane Recovery: on a short rest, recover spell slots totaling up to 2 levels (none above 5th).

grantsPool.label: Portent Dice
grantsPool.reminder: Portent: replace any d20 (yours or a creature you can see) with a recorded Portent roll.

grantsPool.label: Heroic Inspiration
grantsPool.reminder: Heroic Inspiration: reroll any d20 and keep either result.

grantsPool.label: Hit Dice
grantsPool.reminder: Hit Die: roll 1d6+2, then add it with Heal.

stat_init.title: Initiative
body: Initiative equals your Dexterity modifier (+1). Place the Alert feat via Human Versatile to add your Proficiency Bonus.

stat_speed.title: Speed
body: Your walking speed is 30 feet. You wear no armor, so nothing slows you.

stat_prof.title: Proficiency Bonus
body: +2 at levels 1–4 (rises to +3 at level 5). Added to attack rolls, saves and skills you're proficient with, your spell save DC, and your spell attack.

stat_pass.title: Passive Perception
body: Passive Perception = 10 + your Perception modifier (Wis +1, proficiency +2) = 13.

asi.title: Level 4 — Ability Score Improvement
body: You raised Intelligence from 17 to 19 (+4). That improved your spell save DC, spell attack, Arcana/History/Investigation, and Int saves.
A feat was the alternative; you also still have the Human Versatile Origin feat to place.

portent.title: Portent
body: When you finish a long rest, roll two d20s and record the numbers. You can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check — made by you or a creature you can see — with one of these rolls (before the roll is made). Each recorded roll is used once.
Write the two values somewhere; tap Use to mark one spent.

diviner.title: Divination Savant
body: When you copy a Divination spell into your spellbook, it takes half the usual gold and time. You also gained Portent at this level.

scholar.title: Scholar
body: You gain Expertise in one Intelligence-based skill — taken in Arcana, doubling your Proficiency Bonus there (Arcana +6).

arcanerecovery.title: Arcane Recovery
body: Once per day, when you finish a short rest, you can recover expended spell slots whose levels total no more than half your wizard level rounded up (2 at level 4), none of 6th level or higher.
Tap Use to mark it spent; it returns on a long rest.

ritualadept.title: Ritual Adept
body: You can cast any spell with the Ritual tag as a ritual if it's in your spellbook, without preparing it — it just takes 10 minutes longer and uses no slot.

magicinitiate.title: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
body: From the Wizard list you learn two cantrips (Toll the Dead and Prestidigitation) and one level-1 spell (Detect Magic). Intelligence is the spellcasting ability, matching your wizard numbers.
You can cast Detect Magic once per long rest without a slot, and also with your slots. Granted by the Sage background.

sage.title: Background: Sage
body: A life of study and research. Sage grants the Magic Initiate (Wizard) Origin feat, proficiency in Arcana and History, Calligrapher's Supplies, and the +2 Intelligence / +1 Constitution that shaped your scores.

resourceful.title: Human: Resourceful
body: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a long rest. Spend it to reroll a d20.

skillful.title: Human: Skillful
body: You gain proficiency in one additional skill — taken in Perception, fitting a watcher of omens and signs.

versatile.title: Human: Versatile
body: You gain a second Origin feat of your choice, on top of Magic Initiate from Sage. Strong picks: Alert, Lucky, Tough, or another Magic Initiate. Not yet placed — choose one and it goes here.

spellslots1.title: Spell Slots (Level 1)
body: Four 1st-level slots, regained on a long rest (some recoverable on a short rest via Arcane Recovery).
Spell save DC 14 (8 + Int +4 + prof +2); spell attack +6. Tap Use to spend a slot.

spellslots2.title: Spell Slots (Level 2)
body: Three 2nd-level slots, regained on a long rest. Casting a spell at 2nd level uses one. Tap Use to spend a slot.

inspiration.title: Heroic Inspiration
body: Expend it to reroll any d20 and use either roll; you can hold only one. Your Human Resourceful trait grants it after every long rest.

hitdice.title: Hit Dice
body: On a short rest you can spend Hit Dice to heal, rolling 1d6+2 each (1d6 + Constitution modifier). Regain spent Hit Dice on a long rest.

firebolt.title: Fire Bolt
body: Hurl a mote of fire at a target within 120 ft: ranged spell attack (+6), 1d10 fire on a hit. The die grows at higher levels (2d10 at character level 5).
A flammable object hit by it ignites if it isn't worn or carried.

magehand.title: Mage Hand
body: A spectral hand you can use to manipulate objects, open doors, or carry up to 10 pounds, for 1 minute. It can't attack or carry more than 10 lb.

minorillusion.title: Minor Illusion
body: Create a sound or a 5-ft image for 1 minute. Investigation (vs your DC 14) reveals an image as false.

light.title: Light
body: Touch an object so it sheds Bright Light in a 20-ft radius and Dim Light for another 20 ft for 1 hour (Dex save to avoid if cast on a creature's gear).

tollthedead.title: Toll the Dead
body: A target makes a Wisdom save (DC 14) or takes 1d8 necrotic — 1d12 if it's already missing hit points. From Magic Initiate.

prestidigitation.title: Prestidigitation
body: A handful of minor magical tricks — clean or soil an object, light or snuff a small flame, chill/warm/flavor food, a harmless sensory effect. From Magic Initiate.

detectmagic.title: Detect Magic
body: For the duration you sense magic within 30 ft; as an action you see a faint aura around a visible magical thing and learn its school.
From Magic Initiate you can cast it free once per long rest, or with a slot. Tap Use below to spend the free cast.

shield.title: Shield
body: As a Reaction when you're hit by an attack or targeted by Magic Missile, gain +5 AC until the start of your next turn (including against the triggering attack) and take no damage from Magic Missile.

magearmor.title: Mage Armor
body: Touch a willing creature wearing no armor; its base AC becomes 13 + Dex for 8 hours. Toggle it in the Armor Class panel — it puts you at AC 14.

magicmissile.title: Magic Missile
body: Three darts of force, each hitting automatically for 1d4+1 force; split them among targets you can see within 120 ft. A higher-level slot adds one dart per level.

sleep.title: Sleep
body: Creatures in a 5-ft sphere make a Wisdom save; on a failure they have the Incapacitated condition until the end of your next turn (or until they take damage / someone uses an action to wake them). Concentration, up to 1 minute.

featherfall.title: Feather Fall
body: As a Reaction when you or a creature within 60 ft falls, up to five falling creatures descend 60 ft/round and take no falling damage for 1 minute.

mistystep.title: Misty Step
body: As a Bonus Action, teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see, wreathed in silvery mist.

augury.title: Augury
body: Read an omen about a specific course of action you plan to take within 30 minutes: Weal, Woe, Weal and Woe, or Nothing. Very on-theme for a diviner.

web.title: Web
body: Fill a 20-ft cube with sticky webs (Difficult Terrain). A creature entering or starting its turn there makes a Dexterity save or is Restrained; it can break free with a Strength check. Flammable.

mirrorimage.title: Mirror Image
body: Three illusory duplicates appear around you. When an attack hits you, it may strike a duplicate instead (rolled randomly); each duplicate has AC 10 + your Dex and pops when hit.

quarterstaff.title: Quarterstaff
body: A simple melee backup (you're not a fighter). Two-handed it deals 1d8−1. Your real offense is your spells.

dagger.title: Dagger
body: Finesse, so it uses your Dexterity (+1). Light and throwable — a last-ditch option.
